pageContext.name: Kainé
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Square Enix present the latest in the PLAY ARTS KAI series, the Kainé Action Figure!This dual-wielding warrior from NieR Replicant ver.1.22474487139..., an upgraded version of the original game, NieR Replicant, which depicts the story of a brother and sister living in a deteriorating world in the distant future.  All of Kainé's charms, from her highly revealing, light blue and black costume, to the bandages covering half her body, and even her dignified expression, have all been fully rendered with this figure.  Accessories include the Grimoire Weiss, decorated with its distinctive cover and interior printings replicated so it can be displayed open, as well as the Lunar Tear, which can be held in her hand. In addition, she comes with an alternate outfit piece to replicate action poses, an alternate shouting face, a blade in a broken state in addition to the normal twin blades, and various extra hands are also included, making this a highly customizable set.  With this level of customization, we hope you can enjoy recreating some of your favorite poses from the game.
